title: FIGURE 9 in A new species of the tridentine Rhinotridens from the Amazon basin (Siluriformes: Trichomycteridae)
author: de Pinna, Mário

description: FIGURE 9 | Pectoral skeleton of Rhinotridens britskii, paratype, MZUSP 129867, 15.2 mm SL; ventral view. Cle, cleithrum; Pcr, pectoral-fin rays; Pr1-2, proximal radials 1-2; Sco, scapulocoracoid. Scale bar = 0.3 mm.
